pageContext.name: Ochaco Uraraka (Version 2)
pageContext.description: Ochaco Uraraka in her latest hero costume is coming out as a figure!  From the popular anime series, My Hero Academia, Ochaco Uraraka rejoins the ARTFX J line with a brand new look!  The pose captures Ochaco as she floats effortlessly using her Zero Gravity Quirk.  Extra attention was paid to the delicate wrinkles in her costume from her movement, as well as the way the rubble appears to float in zero gravity.  Be sure to enjoy this figure by adding her to your collection!
